name: data-analyzer
description: Analyze CSV, JSON, and Excel data files: statistics, schema analysis, querying, and merging

actions.title: Analyze Data
actions.description: Perform comprehensive statistical analysis of the data file

actions.title: Query Data
actions.description: Ask a question about the data and get an answer

params.label: Question
params.placeholder: e.g. What is the average sales by region?

actions.title: Analyze Schema
actions.description: Analyze the data structure, field types, and relationships

actions.title: Merge Data
actions.description: Analyze how the selected data files can be merged or joined
